message:
fix(test): replace fragile computed fixture references with literals

RatingDisplay and ReviewList tests used arithmetic on fixture values
(e.g. fixtures.ratingSummary.upvotes * 16) while hardcoding the
expected total/approvalRate. If fixtures changed, these would silently
become inconsistent. Use plain literal values instead.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
